description: You have a Maven project called 'student-records' open in IntelliJ IDEA at ~/IdeaProjects/student-records/. The project is a student records management system with model classes (Student, Course, Enrollment) and a service class (RecordManager). Add the Google Gson dependency (groupId: com.google.code.gson, artifactId: gson, version: 2.10.1) to the pom.xml and implement the toJson, fromJson, exportToFile, and importFromFile methods in src/main/java/com/example/export/JsonExporter.java. The implementation must use Gson to handle serialization and deserialization of Student lists, including file I/O. Ensure the project compiles and all unit tests in src/test/java/com/example/export/JsonExporterTest.java pass.
